svg.title: The Tinkerer’s Fibonacci Notes — Spacious Audited Master Layout
svg.desc: A spacious, audited SVG master composition for later identical-geometry line-art and quill-parchment renders. All panels are contained, labeled, and truth-bounded: exact recurrence, finite ratio convergence, normalized time metaphor, square-arc spiral approximation, exact structures, empirical claim checking, source hierarchy, and philosophical marginalia.
svg.text: single vector master: same geometry for clean line art and quill-parchment renders

text.tspan: Shows seed addresses, duplicate-one hinge, and dependency arrows.
Says D_v is produced by adding the two immediately previous destinations.
Complete for near horizon Fv -1 through Fv 12; later terms continue by the same rule.
Fv 0 → 1
Fv 1 → 1

svg.text: truth boundary: process step ≠ destination value; duplicate 1 is not merged

text.tspan: Shows finite forward ratios at discrete integer steps.
Says the labeled points oscillate toward φ; the horizontal line is a limit, not a reached value.
NO FINITE RATIO EQUALS φ
line segments connect observations; no smooth curve
Shows a normalized interpretive number line.
Says yesterday-to-today and today-to-tomorrow are unequal intervals.
Complete only as a metaphor: it is not a physical law or prediction.
Precision: Yesterday = 1/φ ≈ 0.618033988750; Today = 1; Tomorrow = φ ≈ 1.618033988750
METAPHOR, NOT PHYSICAL LAW
FUTURE-SIDE INTERVAL IS φ TIMES THE PAST-SIDE INTERVAL
Shows true squares with side lengths 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13.
Says each arc is a quarter-circle whose radius equals its square side.
PIECEWISE QUARTER-CIRCLE APPROXIMATION
NOT AN EXACT LOGARITHMIC GOLDEN SPIRAL
Shows theorem seals with concrete cues, not decorative placeholders.
Says exact statements require declared indexing and hypotheses.
example: n=5 ⇒ 8·3 - 5² = -1
unique sum with no consecutive Fibonacci parts
shallow diagonal sums:
residues repeat in Pisano cycles
repository convention: D_v = F_(v+1)
do not shift Fv labels silently

svg.text: EACH IDENTITY REQUIRES ITS STATED INDEXING

text.tspan: Shows a disciplined evaluation table rather than a claim of proof.
Says resemblance must be tested against data, rival models, residuals, and status.
RESEMBLANCE IS NOT MECHANISM
EMPIRICAL CLAIMS NEED MEASUREMENT
COMPARE ALTERNATIVES
Shows the authority ladder used before any claim becomes a label.
Says lower-level synthesis cannot override TR, AV, or REF statements.

svg.text: positive authority for values, definitions, formulas, limits
diagnostic authority for errors, hazards, and REF values
condensed routing layer and canon summary
visual contract for truth-status and evidence boundary

text.tspan: Shows guardrails for interpreting the sheet.
Says recurrence can make later terms implicit without making real events magical or predetermined.

svg.text: THE FUTURE TERM IS IMPLICIT IN THE SEEDS AND RULE
KNOWN FROM KNOWN, NOT CAUSED BY MAGIC
do not confuse derivation with causation
Fv and conventional F_n remain distinct
THE DUPLICATE ONE IS A HINGE
Fv 0 and Fv 1 are distinct process steps
master geometry only: parchment, ink variation, and ornamental treatment belong to later render passes without moving content
